overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City during golden hour. The character navigates urban streets, encounters a red sports car, passes a security mech with armed guards, and explores the futuristic cityscape with distinctive red elevated highways and towering skyscrapers.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the intersection crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking across the crosswalk from left to right, passing close to the character

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated at the intersection
multi-story contemporary building with glass facade and geometric architecture
large multi-level parking garage with open concrete levels
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit urban intersection during golden hour, crossing the street via a marked crosswalk. A modern office building rises on the left while a parking structure dominates the right. The character passes another pedestrian crossing in the opposite direction while traffic lights control the sparse vehicle flow.

events.description: character walks under the red elevated highway structure, entering partial shade

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, moving deeper into the covered urban corridor

entered.detail: massive red structural beams and roadway overhead creating a covered corridor effect
shadowed modern building wall with horizontal lines running along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered corridor beneath a distinctive red elevated highway structure. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows and golden sunlight filtering through gaps. The modern office building remains visible to the left while the path continues under the massive red steel beams overhead.

events.description: character stops at a traffic pole on the sidewalk and waits
red sports car pulls up and stops at the curb near the character

agents.ego_description: standing at a traffic pole waiting, then observing the red car as it approaches and stops

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the street and pulling to a stop at the curb

entered.detail: bright red futuristic sports sedan with glowing headlights and sleek cyberpunk design
tall pole with traffic signals and street signs mounted on it

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a traffic pole beneath the red overpass to wait. A red sports car approaches and pulls up to the curb nearby. The elevated highway structure looms overhead while the character observes the vehicle before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with mech and guards

events.description: character encounters a large security mech with armed guards standing nearby
character walks past the mech and guards, continuing along the building wall

agents.ego_description: walking past a security checkpoint featuring a large mech, maintaining distance while observing the area

notable_agents.action: large black security mech standing stationary with glowing orange lights, flanked by armed guards

entered.detail: massive bipedal combat robot with black armor, glowing orange sensors, and weapon mounts
tall dark metal wall with vertical ridges running alongside the pedestrian path
massive cylindrical skyscraper with smoke billowing from the top, dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: The character passes a security checkpoint where a massive black combat mech stands guard with armed personnel. After passing the mech, the character walks along a narrow path beside a dark industrial wall, with a towering smoking skyscraper visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with corporate buildings

events.description: character emerges from narrow path into a wide open plaza with full sky visibility
vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road adjacent to the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area, observing the surrounding skyscrapers and passing vehicles

entered.detail: low-rise contemporary commercial buildings with glass storefronts facing the plaza
futuristic walkway structure connecting buildings across the open space
tall reflective glass tower catching the golden hour sunlight

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide sunlit urban plaza surrounded by modern corporate buildings and a glass skyscraper reflecting the golden light. Vehicles move along the adjacent road while elevated pedestrian bridges span between structures. The smoking tower now appears to the left as the character crosses the open space.

events.description: character turns left into a narrow walkway between tall building walls

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow alleyway and following a pedestrian with distinctive pink hair ahead

notable_agents.action: person with pink hair walking ahead in the narrow passage, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: tall dark concrete wall forming the left boundary of the narrow passage
tall building wall on the right side creating an enclosed corridor

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrow enclosed walkway between tall building walls, leaving the open plaza behind. A pedestrian with pink hair walks ahead in the same direction. The passage is shadowed and confined compared to the previous open areas, with the smoking tower still visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban district that transitions from open intersections into shadowed industrial corridors and finally into a confined city walkway. It begins with the character crossing a bright intersection between an office building and a parking structure before moving into a semi-covered corridor beneath a massive red elevated highway. As the character pauses by a traffic pole for a red sports car to pull up, the scene shifts toward a security checkpoint guarded by a black combat mech and armed personnel. The path then opens up into a wide, golden-lit corporate plaza featuring reflecting glass skyscrapers and elevated pedestrian bridges, with a smoking tower looming in the distance. Finally, the camera turns away from the open space into a narrow, shadowed walkway between towering walls, following a pink-haired pedestrian deeper into the urban canyon.
